description:
Closed tasks are git-rm'd from the balls/tasks orphan branch at close (Store::close_and_archive). They survive only in that branch's HISTORY, so today there is NO way to view a closed task: bl show <id> hits TaskNotFound (load_task reads the state-branch HEAD checkout), and bl list --all is a DEAD flag (it filters status!=Closed off an on-disk scan, but closed task files are off-disk).

WHY: 'closed is recoverable via git' is stated in the skill/README as a property of the design, but nothing in bl actually exercises it. A task tracker you can't ask 'what did we already do / show me bl-xxxx that we closed' is half a tracker. Both user-requested surfaces (single closed task; closed-only list; open+closed combined) reduce to the same archaeology, so they MUST share one core — no redundant git-log walkers.

KEY SUBTLETY: close_and_archive never re-saves the task before git-rm, so the archived blob is the task in its PRE-close (review) state. Authoritative closed facts live in the deletion commit, not the file: subject 'state: close <id> - <title>' or 'balls: close <id> - <title>' (+ body = close/reviewer message), commit date ~= closed_at. Reconstruction overlays status=Closed + closed_at + close-note from the commit onto the parsed blob.

DESIGN:
- New src/archive_recovery.rs (+ archive_recovery_tests.rs), <=300 lines each. Runs in store.state_worktree_dir() on branch balls/tasks.
  * recover_one(store,id) -> Option<RecoveredTask>: git log -1 --diff-filter=D for .balls/tasks/<id>.json; blob = git show <D>^:path; parse Task; overlay from commit.
  * recover_all(store) -> Vec<RecoveredTask>: git log --diff-filter=D --name-only over .balls/tasks/, newest deletion per id wins, skip .notes.jsonl.
  * Stealth/no_git: return empty + caller prints clear 'recovery needs the git state branch' notice (non-fatal).
- bl show: cmd_show falls back to archive_recovery::recover_one on TaskNotFound, then existing render_show::render path (delivery::resolve unaffected — [bl-id] tag is permanent on main). NO new flag (fixes existing help-text promise; elegance: no redundant path).
- bl list: add --closed (closed only) to CLI; make existing --all mean open+closed together (live tasks + reconstructed closed, de-duped, stable sort). --json for both. cmd_list + cli.rs + main.rs dispatch.

ACCEPTANCE:
- bl show <closed id> renders the task with status closed, closed-at from the deletion commit, close message, and resolved delivered: sha. Unknown id still errors cleanly.
- bl list --closed lists every archived task (oldest->newest), --json shaped like bl list --json.
- bl list --all = open + closed merged, no dupes; default bl list unchanged.
- Stealth/no-git: graceful 'unavailable' message, no panic, exit 0 for list / clean error for show.
- 100% coverage incl. recreate+reclose (newest deletion wins), no-parent task, stealth path. All files <=300 lines. Full test suite green at merge.

BC: no Task schema change; no new Status; recovery is read-only git plumbing. Old bl unaffected.
title: Surface closed/archived tasks: bl show <id> history fallback + bl list --closed/--all
